raw: {"questions":[{"label":"What feels most off","name":"What feels most off in your work right now, James?","description":"Lets him name the part of work that feels misaligned without presuming the cause.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"landing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Rituals since then","name":"What changed for you in team rituals after the promotion decision?","description":"Surfaces the specific shift in participation and whether it is about the rituals themselves or something broader.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"What feels different","name":"What feels different about your week-to-week work since then?","description":"Looks for a broader change in how he is showing up without naming the promotion directly.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback he got","name":"What feedback do you remember actually hearing from that process?","description":"Checks what he believes was said versus what may have been inferred.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Feedback that stuck","name":"What part of that feedback has stayed with you?","description":"Surfaces the message he internalized and whether it is shaping his next moves.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring fit","name":"What is mentoring giving you that your core product work is not?","description":"Tests whether the mentoring program is additive or pulling energy away from his main path.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring tradeoff","name":"What are you choosing not to spend time on because of the mentoring program?","description":"Forces a concrete trade-off and reveals whether the program is crowding out higher-leverage work.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Concrete path","name":"What concrete path forward feels real to you right now?","description":"Gets him to name the route he actually believes in, rather than an abstract aspiration.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next step from me","name":"What do you need from me to make the next couple of weeks steadier?","description":"Ends with a direct ask for support and next-step commitment without opening a new topic.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
